summary: Public storefront smoke test for new product types (standard / unit_based / variant) on /shop/seed-main-shop. NOTE: the slug 'dukani-store' from the request does not exist in this environment — the seeded Main Shop slug is 'seed-main-shop' (mpesa_configured=false, plan=pos_online). Reused seeded products (Seed Phone standard stock=10, Sugar unit_based base=50000g with 250g/500g/1kg, Diapers variant Small=20/Medium=35/Large=18) instead of the iteration_2 TEST_ products (those were on a different deleted shop). Verified: (1) /shop/seed-main-shop loads with hero, trust strip, category bar and product grid (data-testid='public-shop-products'). (2) Standard add: 2× Seed Phone in cart, total KES 600. Re-clicking Add to cart on the same standard line increments qty (no dedicated +/- buttons in the cart row — only ✕ remove). (3) Unit-based: picking 250g then Add adds line `Sugar · 250g @ KES 45`; switching to 500g and Add creates a SECOND distinct cart line `Sugar · 500g @ KES 90`. _lineId uniqueness confirmed (`<pid>::<unit_label>`). (4) Variant: picking Small→Add then Medium→Add produces two distinct lines `Diapers · Small @ KES 250` and `Diapers · Medium @ KES 300`. (5) CheckoutModal on online flow: with mpesa_configured=false the only payment method visible is `💵 Pay on pickup` (data-testid='co-method-cash'). NO `co-method-mpesa_manual` button rendered (count=0). NO `co-method-mpesa` rendered either since shop has no Daraja keys — exactly as availableMethods() in CheckoutModal.jsx specifies. Manual M-Pesa is correctly hidden on the online storefront. (6) Cash 'Pay on pickup' checkout for mixed cart (2× Seed Phone + Sugar 250g + Sugar 500g) → POST /api/orders/create returned 200 with order_id 27685874-... and DK-2026-000011 receipt; result modal shows '🎉 Order placed', '💵 Pay on pickup' message, and `🔎 Track this order` link. (7) Second cash checkout for 1× Diapers Small + 1× Diapers Medium → 200, order_id 10b1111d-..., receipt DK-2026-000012. (8) Backend atomic stock decrement verified by re-fetching /api/public/shop/seed-main-shop/products: Seed Phone 10→8 (Δ2), Sugar base_stock 50000→49250 (Δ750 = 250+500), Diapers Small 20→19, Medium 35→34, Large 18 untouched. ✅ matches request spec exactly. (9) GET /api/orders/track/{id}?contact={phone} returned 200 for both orders and includes per-item `unit_label` ('250g','500g') for the sugar lines and `variant_name` ('Small','Medium') for the diaper lines. (10) 'Already ordered?' tile (track-phone-input + track-order-btn) successfully looked up order by phone 254700999777 and navigated to /track/{id}?contact=... — phone tracking still works after the new picker logic.

issues: Cart line has only an ✕ remove button — no dedicated +/- qty buttons. Customer can only INCREASE qty by clicking 'Add to cart' on the product card again; there is no way to DECREMENT qty without removing the entire line. Acceptable but inconsistent with POS UX.

The fixed bottom-right cart panel (cartStyle in PublicShopPage.jsx, max-width 320, z-index 50) physically overlaps the right-most product card's `Add to cart` button on standard desktop viewports (≈1400×1000) once the cart has 2-3 items. A user clicking Diapers (right column) while a cart panel is showing has the click intercepted by the cart panel. The button still works via keyboard / programmatic click, but a real customer with a mouse will be blocked. Recommend either (a) reserving right padding on the products grid when cart is open, or (b) making cart collapsible / using a slide-over drawer.
Trust chip says '🟢 M-Pesa & Card' even when shop.mpesa_configured=false and there is no card processor — slightly misleading. Consider hiding/dimming when shop has no payment methods.

action_items: Fix cart-panel overlap on right column product cards (z-index/layout) — currently only force-clicks bypass it; real users on desktop will struggle to add right-column items once cart appears.

Add +/- qty buttons (or a numeric input) to the cart line in PublicShopPage.jsx to allow customers to decrement qty without removing the line — matches POS behaviour and matches the test-spec phrase 'change qty, cart updates total'.
Optional: also call /api/analytics/track 'view_shop' is firing but uses shop._id which the public endpoint does expose — verified working; no action.
critical_code_review_comments: PublicShopPage.jsx is 766 lines mixing presentation + cart state + analytics + tracking lookup. Split into PublicShopHeader, PublicShopProductCard (with picker), PublicShopCart and PublicShopTrackTile components for maintainability and to enable unit testing of addToCart's _lineId logic.

PublicShopPage.jsx addToCart effectivePrice fallback: for variant `Number(v?.price || p.price || 0)` — if variant.price is 0 (legitimately free) it falls back to p.price. Use `v?.price ?? p.price` instead.

PublicShopPage.jsx isUB / isVR are computed as a number (`(p.selling_units||[]).length`) rather than boolean; truthy-falsy works but linting and downstream `&&` rendering can leak `0` into the DOM if length is 0. Prefer `> 0`.

CheckoutModal.jsx availableMethods() correctly omits mpesa_manual on the online flow — good. But the flow still has a dead `mpesa_manual` branch (lines 222-319) that can never be reached from this modal; either remove it or extract into a separate ManualMpesaResultModal that is mounted only from POS.
PublicShopPage.jsx cart panel uses a fixed z-index:50 floating block at bottom-right that physically obscures product CTAs on the right column at standard desktop widths — see design_issues.

success_rate.backend: 100% (atomic stock decrement, /track returns unit_label & variant_name, 'pay on pickup' creates order)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on the 9 acceptance bullets that map to the seeded shop's existing products. Sold-out-variant disabled rendering was NOT reproducibly testable because no seeded variant currently has stock=0; the code path (out=v.stock<=0 → disabled+line-through) was validated by static review of PublicShopPage.jsx lines 466-495.

test_credentials: owner.seed@dukani.dev / Dukani@2026 (only used to enumerate shops/products; storefront flow is unauthenticated as designed).
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Reused the seeded Main Shop ('seed-main-shop'). Two real customer orders were placed and persisted: order 27685874-8e70-414c-a444-5fef830c8905 (phone 254700999777, total KES 735, mixed standard+unit_based) and order 10b1111d-8c03-40aa-8df4-75e1044d7cd6 (phone 254700999888, total KES 550, variant). Stock now: Seed Phone=8, Sugar base_stock=49250g, Diapers (Small=19, Medium=34, Large=18). If main agent re-runs, expect further decrement.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The slug in the original request (/shop/dukani-store) does not exist on this environment — the seeded Main Shop slug is 'seed-main-shop'. Use that for any storefront test. Shop has mpesa_configured=false, so CheckoutModal renders ONLY '💵 Pay on pickup'. To validate the '🟢 M-Pesa (Instant)' branch you would need to flip mpesa_configured=true on the shop doc (or seed Daraja keys). To validate sold-out variant disabled rendering, create a TEST product with one variant.stock=0 — none of the current seeded variants are sold out. The floating cart panel overlaps right-column Add-to-cart buttons; tests should use page.evaluate(...).click() or scroll cards into the upper viewport to bypass the overlap.
rca of the issue: Initial Diapers add-to-cart click was intercepted by the fixed bottom-right cart overlay (z-index 50, position fixed) — `force=True` did not bypass because Playwright still aimed at the element center which was under the overlay rectangle. Resolved in test by using page.evaluate to scroll into center then dispatch a synthetic click; the underlying app behavior is correct, but this is a real UX regression for end users on desktop and is filed under design_issues.
